meaning: n.<俗>骗子(尤指赌博者),骗徒,<英>破坏罢工的工人
examples: Summary. The effects of 4 fungicides applied at sowing, on the severity of blackleg disease of rapeseed were studied in the field.
Carrying out Operation Blackleg was a physically demanding and dangerous mission for those involved, with some dives lasting for up to eight hours.
